nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=85 beats='Pip the fox cub is playing on the snowy hill and notices one red mitten is gone; one bare hand is cold; Pip decides to look for it'>>

choices.label: Look under the big pine tree.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='No mitten under the pine, but Pip spots little footprints in the snow heading toward the creek; a gentle clue, never scary'>>

choices.label: Follow the footprints to the creek.
Go back to the snowy hill.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Hoppy the rabbit has not seen the mitten but says she heard birds chirping by the creek about something red'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='The mitten is not on the sled track, but a single red thread is caught on a twig pointing toward the creek'>>

choices.label: Follow the red thread to the creek.
Try the hill one more time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='At the frozen creek Pip sees a flash of red in the snow, hears birds chirping above, and smells warm cocoa from home; three friendly paths'>>

choices.label: Reach for the red thing in the snow.
Look up at the chirping birds.
Follow the smell of cocoa home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='The birds show Pip the red mitten snagged on a low branch, just out of reach; Pip can stretch up or call for help'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Pips friends Hoppy and the squirrels make a wobbly, giggly chain to reach the high branch together'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='At home Mama Fox has warm cocoa; as Pip pulls off the snowy boots, something red tumbles out of a boot'>>

choices.label: See what fell out of the boot.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='Pip picks up the red mitten and slips it on; both hands are warm again; a happy, cozy resolution'>>
<<FILL role=completion words=80 beats='The friends lift the mitten down all together and cheer; Pip is warm and grateful for good friends'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=80 beats='The lost mitten was tucked inside Pips boot the whole time; everyone laughs and shares cocoa; a gentle, funny ending'>>
